info.title: Quote Vendor Services API
info.description: Access to manage quotation and purchase agreement information in John Deere Sales Center - Quote (JDSC Quote).

OAuth2.description: Three-legged OAuth 2.0 as used by John Deere Dealer Solutions APIs.

QuotesFilterRequest.description: Search criteria for quotes. All fields except limit and offset are required by the API.

DeletedQuotesFilterRequest.description: Search criteria for deleted quotes. All fields except limit and offset are required.

TradeInsDeleteRequest.description: Identifies trade-ins to remove from a quote.

AddInventoryEquipmentRequest.description: At least one field is required per API contract.

CreateQuoteRequest.description: Creates a blank quote for a customer. At least one identifying field is required.

UpdateCustomerRequest.description: At least one of primaryCustomer or secondaryCustomer should be present.

post.description: Filter quotes based on search criteria. All request input values except limit and offset are required.
Filter deleted quotes. All request input values except limit and offset are required.

delete.description: Delete multiple trade-ins associated with a quote.

post.summary: Add inventory equipment to a quote
post.description: Add inventory equipment to a quote. Any field in the request body may satisfy the requirement.
Create a blank quote for a customer. Add equipment using Add Inventory Equipment afterward.
Create a new quote from a master quote.
Create a copy of an existing quote.
Copy equipment associated with a quote.

get.description: High-level quote information. For line-item detail use equipment, trade-in, purchase agreement, and recap PDF endpoints.
Demo agreement details by quote id.
Rental agreement details by quote id.
All equipment lines on a quote.
Single equipment line on a quote.
Photos and documents for an equipment line.

patch.description: Update quote name. Any field in the body may satisfy the requirement.

x-codeSamples.label: cURL
x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request PATCH \
  --url 'https://quote-api-sandbox.deere.com/om/cert/vendor/v1/quotes/quote-name' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer <access_token>' \
  --header 'Accept: application/json' \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --data '{"quoteId":"QT-20260001","name":"Revised title"}'

delete.description: Delete multiple quotes in one request.
Delete one or more equipment lines from a quote.

patch.description: Update the store location on a quote.
Update the salesperson on a quote.
Update customers on a quote. At least one of primaryCustomer or secondaryCustomer should be present.

get.description: Delivery document details by quote ID.
PDF for a delivery document by delivery document ID.
